value.reason: The cited page explicitly documents a "Scheduled Tasks" feature under that exact name, describing how users can schedule messages to be sent to their agents while away, with repeatable time-based triggers. The cell label "Scheduled Tasks" matches the page heading exactly. The description accurately reflects the page content: scheduling messages to agents at specific times, repeatable time-based triggers, and autonomous agent runs without user presence. The description's claim about configuration via "the agent interface" is a reasonable characterization, though the page doesn't detail the exact UI steps — nothing in the description contradicts or invents claims beyond what the page states. This capability is clearly distinct from cloud execution environment and background/async execution as described on the page.
